metadata.name: Group Settings - Governed Baseline
metadata.description: Configures M365 group defaults: restricts group creation to a specific group, enables guest access to groups, sets usage guidelines URL, and enables sensitivity labels.

groupCreationAllowedGroupId.description: Object ID of the group whose members are allowed to create M365 groups. Leave empty to allow all.

usageGuidelinesUrl.description: URL to the organization's group usage guidelines
